scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @veyra/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @veyra/api-gateway typecheck && python -m py_compile services/visual-learning/pipeline.py services/ai-engine/ollama_client.py services/crawler/crawler.py services/crawler/pagination.py services/browser-automation/automation.py
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @veyra/web test && pnpm --filter @veyra/api-gateway test && python -m pytest services/visual-learning/tests services/crawler/tests services/ai-engine/tests
